title: cyathostemma excelsum
intro: Cyathostemma excelsum, also known as the Coral Honeysuckle, is a type of flowering vine native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Cyathostemma excelsum include teas and infusions made from the leaves and flowers, as well as tinctures and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
